creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
Update for port x1-toolkits/irrlicht to v1.8.1 is available. It contains several bugfixes and improvements.
Furthermore this change also includes:
- defining license for port
- remove dependency to obsolete port devel/linux-js
- staging support

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
